creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2010-02-18 18:33:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/impressive  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Impressive is a program that displays PDF presentation slides with style.
  Smooth alpha-blended slide transitions are provided for the sake of eye
  candy, but in addition to this, Impressive offers some unique tools that
  are very useful for presentations.
  
  WWW:    http://impressive.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             143840
  Submitted by:   Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1311    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/graphics/impressive/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/impressive/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/impressive/pkg-descr (new)
